title: Create: Armor Trims
description: Trim your armor with materials from Create.
body:
### A must-have mod for any pack with create! Adds new armor trim materials for the Create mod


![armor trims](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Q4F90RHI/images/82639bda0c31f3ab1a60bcffd42d6a8fe4dc39db.png)
### Currently Supported Materials:
- Brass
- Zinc
- Rose Quartz
- Experience Nugget
- Refined Radiance
- Shadow Steel
